# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Read [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) first and follow it as the source of truth for all coding guidelines and project conventions.

## Pull Request Requirements

When creating a pull request, follow the title format, description structure, and all rules defined in the [Git Workflow & Pull Request Guidelines](../AGENTS.md#git-workflow--pull-request-guidelines) section of `AGENTS.md`.
